name: Tiramisu #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat 2 egg yolks with 1/4 cup sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add mascarpone and cottage cheese blended together, lemon zest or vanilla. Mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, beat 2 egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff peaks form. Gradually fold into the mascarpone mixture.
4. Mix coffee, liquor or almond extract, and sugar in a cup until dissolved.
5. Layer half of the ladyfingers at the bottom of a bowl, wetting them with half of the coffee mixture.
6. Spread half of the cream on top, add another layer of ladyfingers and coffee, then spread remaining cream on top.
7. Refrigerate for at least 1/2 day.
Before serving:
Sprinkle with cocoa powder.
To make Strawberry-Rhubarb Tiramisu:
1. Cook rhubarb (4 cups) with 1/2 cup sugar and 2 tablespoons water for 5 minutes.
2. Slice strawberries, sprinkle with 1 teaspoon sugar, and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Make the cream mixture using reduced sugar to 3 tablespoons.
4. Layer ladyfingers at the bottom of a bowl, wetting them with rhubarb or strawberry juice.
5. Put a layer of rhubarb, strawberries, half of the cream, and repeat until finished with cream on top.
6. Refrigerate for half a day.
7. Decorate with sliced strawberries before serving.
